benchmark_unit: whole transcript -> final note quality score
purpose: Pre-specify how independent clinician ratings will be compared with Scribeval transcript-to-note scores before any validation claim is made.

analysis_population.included_units: Every blinded case-submission with complete required clinician ratings, exported Scribeval judge scores, and qualified reviewer provenance.
excluded_units: case-submissions missing any required dimension rating
case-submissions without the required overall note-quality rating
ratings from reviewers who fail eligibility, conflict, or training checks
analysis_population.unit_of_analysis: case transcript + blinded final note + dimension

primary_endpoints.target: Scribeval severity rating versus adjudicated clinician consensus severity

secondary_endpoints.target: absolute agreement between 0-1 Scribeval scores and clinician consensus scores
typical absolute score gap between Scribeval and clinician consensus
exact match between Scribeval and clinician consensus severity categories

secondary_endpoints.metric: count and proportion of consensus rows requiring adjudication
secondary_endpoints.target: reviewer disagreement burden by dimension and stratum

handling_rules.missing_ratings: Do not impute missing clinician ratings. Exclude incomplete units from calibration pairs and fail readiness when required coverage is incomplete.
handling_rules.reviewer_disagreement: Build consensus ratings from qualified reviewers. Flag score or severity disagreement for adjudication before validation claims.
handling_rules.adjudication: Validation claims require all required adjudication to be resolved by a qualified adjudicator.
handling_rules.multiple_scribeval_runs: If multiple Scribeval runs are used, analyze exported aggregate judge scores and retain run metadata in the judge-score export.
handling_rules.optional_amt_dimension: AMT medication terminology may be reported as an optional secondary dimension but is not required for the primary validation claim.

sensitivity_analyses: Report agreement by specialty, note source, prompt strategy, and safety-critical failure mode.
Inspect dimensions with low kappa or high mean absolute difference before governance or procurement use.
Repeat interpretation excluding optional AMT medication terminology when it is not collected.
Review adjudication burden by stratum to identify ambiguous rubric instructions or clinically contentious cases.
publication_boundary: This statistical analysis plan is not validation evidence. It defines how a completed independent clinician evidence bundle will be interpreted and should be hashed into the evidence trail before public claims are made.
